sentence: Plan on outside services being over 50% of direct costs**
**Server hardware and software equal ~10% of project costs Under-estimated money pits**

**Seriously reengineering your processes in conjunction with ERP installation is where the $200 million fiascoes come from But focused reengineering on critical processes makes enormous sense Needed: balance between “we always did it this way” and “the new system will only do it this way”.**
